full_text:
Chi Lü (Hongyu) 郗慮 (鴻豫)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chi Lü (郗慮), styledHongyu (鴻豫), was born in Shanyang. Slandered Kong Rong leading to his death and took away the Empress’ seal. Chi Lü was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Chi Lü lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
